---
title: "Meet the Epilab team"
image: assets/group.jpeg
page-layout: full
date-format: "YYYY-MM"
listing:  
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: pi
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  image-height: 200px
  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - /people/pi.yml

- id: lab-member
  sort: "lastname asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 200px
  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
    - /people/phd-student.yml
    - /people/masters-student.yml
    - /people/undergraduate-student.yml

- id: lab-alumni
  sort: 
    - "ended desc"
    - "lastname asc"  
  type: table
  fields: [title, subtitle, ended]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 25px
  field-display-names: 
      title: "Name"
      subtitle: "Role"
      ended: "Ended"
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
    - /people/phd-alumni.yml
    - /people/masters-alumni.yml
    - /people/undergraduate-alumni.yml
    - /people/postdoc-alumni.yml

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {#pi}
:::

## Team

::: {#lab-member}
:::

## Alumni

::: {#lab-alumni}
:::
